vc_research_packets.gaming_thesis: Global interactive entertainment with deep Asia expertise. Partners are former Tencent, McKinsey, and gaming operators. Focus on studios, platforms, and infrastructure.
vc_research_packets.fit_rationale: Pure-play gaming fund with $1.5B AUM. Active seed-stage lead with strong Asian market connections. Recent BIT ODD and Human Computer investments show appetite for AI-enabled gaming. Strong co-investor relationships with a16z and Griffin.
vc_research_packets.outreach_hook: Reference their investment in Human Computer alongside a16z - mention AI-driven character generation and how it aligns with their thesis on the golden age of interactive entertainment.

vc_research_packets.gaming_thesis: Partners with 'craftspeople at the top of their game' - deep product strategy and market validation support. Partners have 30+ years combined gaming experience across EA, Kabam, GREE, Rakuten Games.
vc_research_packets.fit_rationale: Gaming-native partners with operating experience. Portfolio includes thatgamecompany (artistic/AI-ready) and Singularity 6. Shanti Bergel recognized on Techcrunch List. Strong thesis on AI changing distribution and products.
vc_research_packets.outreach_hook: Congratulate them on Layer AI's Game Changers Award - position as AI-native game studio that could be the next thatgamecompany in their portfolio.

vc_research_packets.gaming_thesis: Leading early-stage fund focused on Sports, Lifestyle, and Gaming intersection. Partnered with Michael Jordan for Fund III. Deep domain knowledge in sports/entertainment networks.
vc_research_packets.fit_rationale: Strong recent activity with Jump's $23M Series A. Sports-gaming intersection thesis is highly relevant. Partners Deepen Parikh and Kai Bond are actively investing. 11 portfolio exits show execution capability. Gaming + Sports convergence is a growing market.
vc_research_packets.outreach_hook: Reference their recent Jump investment and the sports-gaming convergence - mention how AI is creating new interaction paradigms in sports simulation and gaming.
vc_research_packets.source: Web research, Sports Business Journal, Sportico

recent_investments.notes: AI characters, co-invested with Makers Fund

vc_research_packets.gaming_thesis: AI x Creative - investing in teams building tomorrow's AI x creative landscape. SPEEDRUN accelerator for AI startups. Focus on developer tools, 3D simulations, vertical agents, novel storytelling.
vc_research_packets.fit_rationale: Perfect fit for AI-gaming intersection. Jonathan Lai specifically focuses on AI x creative via SPEEDRUN. Recent Kaedim and Human Computer investments prove thesis alignment. Most active gaming fund with strongest network effects. Jack Soslow focuses on AI, AR/VR infrastructure.
vc_research_packets.outreach_hook: Mention their investment in Kaedim and the vision for AI-powered game creation - position as the next logical portfolio company in their AI x gaming thesis.
vc_research_packets.source: Web research, a16z.com, Jonathan Lai blog

vc_research_packets.gaming_thesis: Invests at intersection of content, technology and social commerce with emphasis on video games and infrastructure powering immersive virtual worlds. Part of Galaxy Digital (crypto native).
vc_research_packets.fit_rationale: Strong track record with 7 unicorns and 2 IPOs. Gaming + blockchain infrastructure focus aligns with emerging AI-world models. Recent Sonic investment shows appetite for gaming infrastructure. 2024 Japan expansion with DMM shows active market development.
vc_research_packets.outreach_hook: Reference their Sonic investment and the thesis on infrastructure powering virtual worlds - position AI-generated content as the next infrastructure layer for gaming.
